title: Indulgent Tunisian Toor Dal Tagine
description: A creamy, midnight-craving Tunisian dish featuring toor dal, aromatic spices, and fresh cilantro, perfect for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Rinse the toor dal under cold water until clear.
In a medium pot, bring 4 cups of water to a boil, then add the dal and reduce heat to a gentle simmer; cook covered for 20 minutes or until tender.
While the dal simmers, heat 2 tbsp of olive oil in a skillet over medium heat, then sauté diced onion and minced garlic for 3 minutes until fragrant.
Add sliced carrot to the skillet and cook for another 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Stir in tomato paste, cumin powder, coriander powder, salt, and pepper, cooking for 2 minutes to blend the spices.
Pour the sautéed vegetable and spice mixture into the pot of cooked dal and stir until well combined.
Simmer the tagine for an additional 10 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro before serving.
